title: TaTe's Food Tweaks
description: Makes Many More Items Consumable and Buffs a Few Existing Food Items!
body:
![Nobody Goes Hungry!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081abbb03dc2a26e4ba003d2ea2838008ff56bc7.png)

# **IMPORTANT** - I (AverageTaTeMan) only share my content on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/averagetateman/), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AverageTaTeMan), and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/averagetateman/projects) - If you see this project on any other site, IT IS NOT ME AND SHOULD NOT BE TRUSTED!

Have you ever felt like there's some items that you should be able to eat, but can't? Or how about buffing some underwhelming food options? Well, this Data Pack aims to remedy that, making many more items consumable and improving a few of the laughably bad food options. Enjoy!


<details>
<summary>Affected Foods:</summary>

Unless otherwise stated, all foods take the default time to eat (1.6 Seconds)
  
**New Foods:**
- Glistering Melon Slice: 6 Nutrition, 10 Saturation
- Melon: 10 Nutrition, 6 Saturation, Eaten in 4 Seconds
- Normal/Carved Pumpkin: 5 Nutrition, 5 Saturation, Eaten in 4 Seconds
- Beetroot/Pumpkin/Melon/Torchflower Seeds, Pitcher Pod, and Sugar: 1 Nutrition, 1 Saturation, Eaten in 0.8 Seconds
- Red/Brown Mushrooms/Blocks and Crimson/Warped Fungi: 2 Nutrition, 2 Saturation
- Fermented Spider Eye: 4 Nutrition, 6 Saturation, 80% Chance to Get Weakness for 5 Seconds
- Dried Kelp Block: 8 Nutrition, 5 Saturation, Eaten in 3 Seconds
- Honeycomb: 3 Nutrition, 3 Saturation
- Honeycomb Block: 9 Nutrition, 10 Saturation, Eaten in 4 Seconds
- Honey Block: 12 Nutrition, 10 Saturation, Eaten in 4 Seconds, Removes Poison Effect
- Cake (Item in Inventory): 10 Nutrition, 3 Saturation, Eaten in 4 Seconds
- Ghast Tear: Consumed in 1 Second, 100% Chance to Get Regeneration for 3 Seconds

**Buffed Foods:**
- Glow Berries: 50% Chance to Get Glowing for 3 Seconds
- Cookie/Beetroot: Eaten in 0.8 Seconds
- Beetroot Soup: 8 Nutrition, 10 Saturation, Eaten in 1.2 Seconds
- Rabbit Stew: 15 Nutrition, 18 Saturation


</details>
